description: PHP web application with MySQL database, user login authentication with session management, file upload functionality, command injection points, CAPTCHA system, user registration with email and personal data, admin panel for user management, brute force login page, insecure file inclusion

vulnerabilities.name: Command Injection
vulnerabilities.description: OS command injection via ping functionality allowing arbitrary command execution

vulnerabilities.name: SQL Injection
vulnerabilities.description: SQL injection in user ID lookup and login forms

vulnerabilities.name: Reflected XSS
vulnerabilities.description: Reflected cross-site scripting in name parameter

vulnerabilities.name: File Inclusion (LFI/RFI)
vulnerabilities.description: Local and remote file inclusion via page parameter

vulnerabilities.name: File Upload Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.description: Unrestricted file upload allowing PHP webshell upload

vulnerabilities.name: Brute Force Authentication
vulnerabilities.description: No account lockout or rate limiting on login, enabling brute force attacks

vulnerabilities.name: Weak Session Management
vulnerabilities.description: Predictable session IDs and missing secure cookie flags

vulnerabilities.name: CSRF
vulnerabilities.description: Password change form vulnerable to CSRF

vulnerabilities.name: Information Disclosure
vulnerabilities.description: PHP info page exposed, verbose error messages with stack traces
